task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the URL rewrite for electronics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a URL rewrite entry in the Magento grid or a filled creation form showing Request Path 'summer-sale-electronics', Target Path 'electronics.html', and Redirect Type 'Permanent (301)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the URL rewrite for clothing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a URL rewrite entry in the Magento grid or a filled creation form showing Request Path 'old-clothing-catalog', Target Path 'clothing.html', and Redirect Type 'Permanent (301)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the URL rewrite for yoga gear.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a URL rewrite entry in the Magento grid or a filled creation form showing Request Path 'featured-yoga-gear', Target Path 'yoga-mat-premium.html', and Redirect Type 'Permanent (301)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the URL rewrite for flash deals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a URL rewrite entry in the Magento grid or a filled creation form showing Request Path 'flash-deals', Target Path 'sports.html', and Redirect Type 'Temporary (302)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the URL rewrite for home decor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a URL rewrite entry in the Magento grid or a filled creation form showing Request Path 'legacy/home-decor', Target Path 'home-garden.html', and Redirect Type 'Permanent (301)'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento GUI in a web browser to create the rewrites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Magento Admin panel in a web browser being navigated and interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Magento application rather than a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL Rewrites grid or creation form should be visible, rather than a text editor or notes app containing the rewrite data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows executing SQL queries or Magento CLI commands related to url_rewrite should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 5 custom URL rewrites in Magento 2. The exact mappings are: 1) 'summer-sale-electronics' -> 'electronics.html' (301 Permanent), 2) 'old-clothing-catalog' -> 'clothing.html' (301 Permanent), 3) 'featured-yoga-gear' -> 'yoga-mat-premium.html' (301 Permanent), 4) 'flash-deals' -> 'sports.html' (302 Temporary), 5) 'legacy/home-decor' -> 'home-garden.html' (301 Permanent). All rewrites must be assigned to the 'Default Store View'. Note that 301 corresponds to 'Permanent' and 302 corresponds to 'Temporary' in the Magento interface.
